Advisor: Hi Patricia, hi Daniel—nice to meet you both. I’m Alex. Before we get into numbers, what prompted you to set this up now?
Client 1: Hi Alex. I’m Patricia. We’re trying to make sure we’re on track—retirement, and just not missing anything obvious.
Client 2: Yeah, I’m Daniel. I run my own thing, so income can be a little lumpy, and we wanted a second set of eyes.
